title: Deckspace Deck File
description: Defines a deck of cards with optional includes and set definitions

back.description: Default back image URL for all cards in this deck

cards.description: List of card definitions, deck includes, or set definitions

cardDefinition.description: A single card in the deck

face.description: URL or data URI for the card face image

back.description: URL or data URI for this card's back image (overrides deck default)

tags.description: Key-value metadata for filtering and sorting

deckInclude.description: Include another deck's cards into this deck

include.description: URL to another deck file, or a local deck name

setDefinition.description: A named subset of cards from a source deck, used for dealing

name.description: Identifier for this set, referenced by setup files

source.description: Name of the source deck to draw cards from

tags.description: Filter: only include cards matching these tag values

exclude.description: Card indices to exclude (overrides tag filters)

include.description: Card indices to force-include (overrides tag filters)

sort.description: Tag keys to sort by. If omitted, set is shuffled.

take.description: Number of cards to take from the filtered/sorted result
